title: Sicko
lyrics: Hey to myself, how'd I get here again? Here I go again Losing my head Get under somebody else, here you go again Yeah, you call him a friend I call it revenge Trying to find a way back, you stayed back then came back My love has just been waiting, just say it, just say what you need Just say what you need, cause I know I'm so sick of thinking about you I'm so sick of this pretend in my brain Saying we won't end, I'm just so sick of myself How I fall inside my own mind when it comes to you And who wants you to baby? Now we're both here with somebody else So here we go again, yeah No it ain't time to move on but we pretend Now that the damage is done I know you got regrets You can't put it to rest cause I'm still this same mess I'm so sick of thinking about you And thinking about what you did to me And the things and all of the energy swirled in my brain Baby I'm sick I'm so sick and tired of being tired I just want that little light I can find inside of me So you go and just take it, just take it You can take all that was in me That wanted you So now it's dark for you, I see it maybe for me But I'll find my light again There's no matter what you wanna do Cause even if I'm at the bottom baby I can find a way up to dust myself off And come back and make this life a beautiful piece of art baby Thanks for watching! lyricsSegments.text: Hey to myself, how'd I get here again?
Here I go again
Losing my head
Get under somebody else, here you go again
Yeah, you call him a friend
I call it revenge
Trying to find a way back, you stayed back then came back
My love has just been waiting, just say it, just say what you need
Just say what you need, cause I know
I'm so sick of thinking about you
I'm so sick of this pretend in my brain
Saying we won't end, I'm just so sick of myself
How I fall inside my own mind when it comes to you
And who wants you to baby?
Now we're both here with somebody else
So here we go again, yeah
No it ain't time to move on but we pretend
Now that the damage is done
I know you got regrets
You can't put it to rest cause I'm still this same mess
I'm so sick of thinking about you
And thinking about what you did to me
And the things and all of the energy swirled in my brain
Baby I'm sick
I'm so sick and tired of being tired
I just want that little light I can find inside of me
So you go and just take it, just take it
You can take all that was in me
That wanted you
So now it's dark for you, I see it maybe for me
But I'll find my light again
There's no matter what you wanna do
Cause even if I'm at the bottom baby
I can find a way up to dust myself off
And come back and make this life a beautiful piece of art baby
Thanks for watching!
